Updates.Script:
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]') AND type IN (N'U')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] ( [RecId] [dbo].[UdtRecId] IDENTITY (1, 1) NOT NULL ,[CompanyId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[BankAccountId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[PeriodNo] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[PeriodYear] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[PeriodMonth] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[StatementStartDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[StatementDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[PaymentDueDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[CardExpiryDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[Explanation] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[InUse] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[InsertedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[InsertedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[UpdatedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[UpdatedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[IsDeleted] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[DeletedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[DeletedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,CONSTRAINT [PK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([RecId] ASC) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] ) ON [PRIMARY] END GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_Company] FOREIGN KEY ([CompanyId]) REFERENCES [Erp_Company] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_Company] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_BankAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_BankAccount] FOREIGN KEY ([BankAccountId]) REFERENCES [Erp_BankAccount] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_BankAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_BankAccount] GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]') AND type IN (N'U')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] ( [RecId] [dbo].[UdtRecId] IDENTITY (1, 1) NOT NULL ,[CompanyId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[BankAccountId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[CreditCardPeriodId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[BankReceiptItemId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[CurrentAccountReceiptItemId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[InstallmentNo] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[InstallmentCount] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[Amount] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[ForexAmount] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[PaymentReferenceDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[Explanation] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[InsertedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[InsertedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[UpdatedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[UpdatedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[IsDeleted] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[DeletedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[DeletedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,CONSTRAINT [PK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([RecId] ASC) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] ) ON [PRIMARY] END GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_Company] FOREIGN KEY ([CompanyId]) REFERENCES [Erp_Company] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_Company] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccount] FOREIGN KEY ([BankAccountId]) REFERENCES [Erp_BankAccount] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccount] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] FOREIGN KEY ([CreditCardPeriodId]) REFERENCES [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND type IN (N'U')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ( [RecId] [dbo].[UdtRecId] IDENTITY (1, 1) NOT NULL ,[FixedPaymentTypeCode] [dbo].[UdtCode] NULL ,[FixedPaymentTypeName] [dbo].[UdtExpHuge] NULL ,[InUse] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[InsertedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[InsertedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[UpdatedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[UpdatedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[IsDeleted] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[DeletedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[DeletedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,CONSTRAINT [PK_Meta_FixedPaymentType] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([RecId] ASC) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] ) ON [PRIMARY] END GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND name = N'Meta_FixedPaymentType_IX0') CREATE UNIQUE INDEX [Meta_FixedPaymentType_IX0] ON [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([FixedPaymentTypeCode] ASC) GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_FixedPaymentType] WHERE [FixedPaymentTypeCode] = 'MTV') INSERT INTO [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([FixedPaymentTypeCode],[FixedPaymentTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('MTV', N'MTV Ödemesi', 1, 0) GO IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_FixedPaymentType] WHERE [FixedPaymentTypeCode] = 'KDV1') INSERT INTO [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([FixedPaymentTypeCode],[FixedPaymentTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('KDV1', N'KDV-1 Muhtasar Ödemesi', 1, 0) GO IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_FixedPaymentType] WHERE [FixedPaymentTypeCode] = 'KDV2') INSERT INTO [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([FixedPaymentTypeCode],[FixedPaymentTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('KDV2', N'KDV-2 Geçici Vergi Ödemesi', 1, 0) GO IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_FixedPaymentType] WHERE [FixedPaymentTypeCode] = 'TEMIZLIK') INSERT INTO [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([FixedPaymentTypeCode],[FixedPaymentTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('TEMIZLIK', N'Büyükçekmece Beld. Temizlik Vergi Ödemesi', 1, 0) GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]') AND type IN (N'U')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] ( [RecId] [dbo].[UdtRecId] IDENTITY (1, 1) NOT NULL ,[CompanyId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[CurrentAccountId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[FixedPaymentTypeId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[PaymentDay] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[PaymentMonth] [dbo].[UdtInt8] NULL ,[Amount] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[Explanation] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[InUse] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[InsertedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[InsertedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[UpdatedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[UpdatedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[IsDeleted] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[DeletedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[DeletedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,CONSTRAINT [PK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([RecId] ASC) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] ) ON [PRIMARY] END GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_Company] FOREIGN KEY ([CompanyId]) REFERENCES [Erp_Company] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_Company] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_CurrentAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_CurrentAccount] FOREIGN KEY ([CurrentAccountId]) REFERENCES [Erp_CurrentAccount] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_CurrentAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_CurrentAccount] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Meta_FixedPaymentType] FOREIGN KEY ([FixedPaymentTypeId]) REFERENCES [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Meta_FixedPaymentType] GO

IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME ='Erp_BankReceiptItem' AND COLUMN_NAME='FixedPaymentTypeId') ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankReceiptItem] ADD [FixedPaymentTypeId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankReceiptItem_Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankReceiptItem]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankReceiptItem] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankReceiptItem_Meta_FixedPaymentType] FOREIGN KEY ([FixedPaymentTypeId]) REFERENCES [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankReceiptItem_Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankReceiptItem]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankReceiptItem] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankReceiptItem_Meta_FixedPaymentType] GO

CreateScript.CreateScript:
/****** Object: Table [dbo].[Erp_AgingReportResults] Script Date: 02/10/2011 12:25:43 ******/ IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_AgingReportResults]') AND type IN (N'U')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE [Erp_AgingReportResults] ( [RecId] [dbo].[UdtRecId] IDENTITY (1, 1) NOT NULL ,[CompanyId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[ReportNo] [dbo].[UdtCode] NULL ,[ReportDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[Explanation] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[CurrentAccountId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[CurrentAccountCode] [dbo].[UdtCode] NULL ,[CurrentAccountName] [dbo].[UdtName] NULL ,[TradeName] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[AccessCode] [dbo].[UdtCode] NULL ,[CurrentAccountGroupCode] [dbo].[UdtCode] NULL ,[CurrentAccountGroupName] [dbo].[UdtName] NULL ,[AddressPhone] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[AddressMobilePhone] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[AddressFax] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[AddressDetail] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[IbanNo] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[BankAccountName] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[BankAccountExplanation] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[ReceiverTaxNo] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[IdCardNo] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[TermDay] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[InterestRate] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[ForexCode] [dbo].[UdtCode] NULL ,[CurrentAccountForexCode] [dbo].[UdtCode] NULL ,[Balance] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[ActualBalance] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[ForexBalance] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[ForexActualBalance] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[CurrentAccountForexBalance] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[CurrentAccountForexActualBalance] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[DebitDistribution_01] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[DebitDistribution_02] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[DebitDistribution_03] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[DebitDistribution_04] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[DebitDistribution_05] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[DebitDistribution_06] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[DebitDistribution_07] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[DebitDistribution_08] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[DebitDistribution_09] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[DebitDistribution_10] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[IsApproved] [dbo].[UdtInt8] NULL ,[ApprovedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[ApprovedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[ApprovedExplanation] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[InsertedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[InsertedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[UpdatedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[UpdatedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[IsDeleted] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[DeletedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[DeletedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,CONSTRAINT [PK_Erp_AgingReportResults] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ( [RecId] ASC ) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] ) ON [PRIMARY] END GO
/****** Object: ForeignKey [FK_Erp_AgingReportResults_Erp_Company] Script Date: 02/10/2011 12:25:43 ******/ IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_AgingReportResults_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_AgingReportResults]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_AgingReportResults] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_AgingReportResults_Erp_Company] FOREIGN KEY ([CompanyId]) REFERENCES [Erp_Company] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_AgingReportResults_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_AgingReportResults]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_AgingReportResults] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_AgingReportResults_Erp_Company] GO
/****** Object: ForeignKey [FK_Erp_AgingReportResults_Erp_CurrentAccount] Script Date: 02/10/2011 12:25:43 ******/ IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_AgingReportResults_Erp_CurrentAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_AgingReportResults]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_AgingReportResults] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_AgingReportResults_Erp_CurrentAccount] FOREIGN KEY ([CurrentAccountId]) REFERENCES [Erp_CurrentAccount] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_AgingReportResults_Erp_CurrentAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_AgingReportResults]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_AgingReportResults] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_AgingReportResults_Erp_CurrentAccount] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]') AND type IN (N'U')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] ( [RecId] [dbo].[UdtRecId] IDENTITY (1, 1) NOT NULL ,[CompanyId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[BankAccountId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[PeriodNo] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[PeriodYear] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[PeriodMonth] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[StatementStartDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[StatementDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[PaymentDueDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[CardExpiryDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[Explanation] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[InUse] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[InsertedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[InsertedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[UpdatedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[UpdatedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[IsDeleted] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[DeletedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[DeletedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,CONSTRAINT [PK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([RecId] ASC) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] ) ON [PRIMARY] END GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_Company] FOREIGN KEY ([CompanyId]) REFERENCES [Erp_Company] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_Company] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_BankAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_BankAccount] FOREIGN KEY ([BankAccountId]) REFERENCES [Erp_BankAccount] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_BankAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod_Erp_BankAccount] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]') AND type IN (N'U')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] ( [RecId] [dbo].[UdtRecId] IDENTITY (1, 1) NOT NULL ,[CompanyId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[BankAccountId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[CreditCardPeriodId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[BankReceiptItemId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[CurrentAccountReceiptItemId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[InstallmentNo] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[InstallmentCount] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[Amount] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[ForexAmount] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[PaymentReferenceDate] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[Explanation] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[InsertedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[InsertedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[UpdatedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[UpdatedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[IsDeleted] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[DeletedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[DeletedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,CONSTRAINT [PK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([RecId] ASC) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] ) ON [PRIMARY] END GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_Company] FOREIGN KEY ([CompanyId]) REFERENCES [Erp_Company] ([RecId]) GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccount] FOREIGN KEY ([BankAccountId]) REFERENCES [Erp_BankAccount] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccount] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] FOREIGN KEY ([CreditCardPeriodId]) REFERENCES [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriodAllocation_Erp_BankAccountCreditCardPeriod] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND type IN (N'U')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ( [RecId] [dbo].[UdtRecId] IDENTITY (1, 1) NOT NULL ,[FixedPaymentTypeCode] [dbo].[UdtCode] NULL ,[FixedPaymentTypeName] [dbo].[UdtExpHuge] NULL ,[InUse] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[InsertedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[InsertedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[UpdatedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[UpdatedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[IsDeleted] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[DeletedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[DeletedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,CONSTRAINT [PK_Meta_FixedPaymentType] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([RecId] ASC) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] ) ON [PRIMARY] END GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND name = N'Meta_FixedPaymentType_IX0') CREATE UNIQUE INDEX [Meta_FixedPaymentType_IX0] ON [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([FixedPaymentTypeCode] ASC) GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_FixedPaymentType] WHERE [FixedPaymentTypeCode] = 'MTV') INSERT INTO [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([FixedPaymentTypeCode],[FixedPaymentTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('MTV', N'MTV Ödemesi', 1, 0) GO IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_FixedPaymentType] WHERE [FixedPaymentTypeCode] = 'KDV1') INSERT INTO [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([FixedPaymentTypeCode],[FixedPaymentTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('KDV1', N'KDV-1 Muhtasar Ödemesi', 1, 0) GO IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_FixedPaymentType] WHERE [FixedPaymentTypeCode] = 'KDV2') INSERT INTO [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([FixedPaymentTypeCode],[FixedPaymentTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('KDV2', N'KDV-2 Geçici Vergi Ödemesi', 1, 0) GO IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [Meta_FixedPaymentType] WHERE [FixedPaymentTypeCode] = 'TEMIZLIK') INSERT INTO [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([FixedPaymentTypeCode],[FixedPaymentTypeName],[InUse],[IsDeleted]) VALUES ('TEMIZLIK', N'Büyükçekmece Beld. Temizlik Vergi Ödemesi', 1, 0) GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]') AND type IN (N'U')) BEGIN CREATE TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] ( [RecId] [dbo].[UdtRecId] IDENTITY (1, 1) NOT NULL ,[CompanyId] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[CurrentAccountId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[FixedPaymentTypeId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL ,[PaymentDay] [dbo].[UdtInt16] NULL ,[PaymentMonth] [dbo].[UdtInt8] NULL ,[Amount] [dbo].[UdtAmount] NULL ,[Explanation] [dbo].[UdtTextLong] NULL ,[InUse] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[InsertedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[InsertedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[UpdatedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[UpdatedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,[IsDeleted] [dbo].[UdtBool] NULL ,[DeletedAt] [dbo].[UdtDateTime] NULL ,[DeletedBy] [dbo].[UdtInt32] NULL ,CONSTRAINT [PK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED ([RecId] ASC) WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] ) ON [PRIMARY] END GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_Company] FOREIGN KEY ([CompanyId]) REFERENCES [Erp_Company] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_Company]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_Company] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_CurrentAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_CurrentAccount] FOREIGN KEY ([CurrentAccountId]) REFERENCES [Erp_CurrentAccount] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_CurrentAccount]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Erp_CurrentAccount] GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Meta_FixedPaymentType] FOREIGN KEY ([FixedPaymentTypeId]) REFERENCES [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_CurrentAccountFixedPaymentSchedule_Meta_FixedPaymentType] GO
IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME ='Erp_BankReceiptItem' AND COLUMN_NAME='FixedPaymentTypeId') ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankReceiptItem] ADD [FixedPaymentTypeId] [dbo].[UdtInt64] NULL GO
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankReceiptItem_Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankReceiptItem]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankReceiptItem] WITH CHECK ADD CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankReceiptItem_Meta_FixedPaymentType] FOREIGN KEY ([FixedPaymentTypeId]) REFERENCES [Meta_FixedPaymentType] ([RecId]) GO
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[FK_Erp_BankReceiptItem_Meta_FixedPaymentType]') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[Erp_BankReceiptItem]')) ALTER TABLE [Erp_BankReceiptItem] CHECK CONSTRAINT [FK_Erp_BankReceiptItem_Meta_FixedPaymentType] GO
